title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!
